A little
about me

I'm a passionate and detail-oriented Java Developer based in India, freshly trained in Full Stack Java Development at Naresh IT Technologies, Hyderabad.

03 / Projects

Featured
Work

👨‍💼
JDBC Servlets Oracle DB MVC

Employee Management System

A full web application to manage employee records end-to-end. Built using JDBC and Servlets with Oracle DB for data persistence. Implements the DAO design pattern and clean MVC architecture for maintainability. Supports full CRUD operations — Create, Read, Update, and Delete employee records.

  • ✦ DAO & MVC design patterns
  • ✦ Full CRUD on employee records
  • ✦ Oracle DB integration via JDBC
GitHub →
📦
Spring Boot Java
Spring BootJavaMySQL

Product Inventory System

A Spring Boot console application with clean layered architecture. Manages product stock, performs CRUD operations, and calculates real-time inventory value.

  • ✦ Model, DAO, Service, Controller layers
  • ✦ Inventory value calculation
  • ✦ Stock management operations
GitHub →

Weather Forecast Application

A responsive web application that provides real-time weather information for any city using a public Weather API. Built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with a modern UI design. The application fetches live data from an external API and displays temperature, humidity, wind speed, and weather conditions with dynamic visuals.

  • ✦ Real-time weather data using Weather API
  • ✦ Dynamic UI with weather-based background changes
  • ✦ Displays temperature, humidity, and wind speed
  • ✦ Integrated API using JavaScript fetch()
  • ✦ Responsive and modern glassmorphism design
Live Demo →
